return.message: Agent demo not loaded for owner ${ownerPartyId}

service-call.name: AdkServices.update#AgentConfig
service-call.in-map: [ownerPartyId: ownerPartyId, agentName: tmpl.agentName, modelName: tmpl.modelName, llmProvider: tmpl.llmProvider, instruction: tmpl.instruction, description: tmpl.description, scheduleExpression: tmpl.scheduleExpression, scheduleEnabled: tmpl.scheduleEnabled, schedulePrompt: tmpl.schedulePrompt, toolMode: tmpl.toolMode, serviceAllowlist: tmpl.serviceAllowlist, writePolicy: tmpl.writePolicy, websiteChat: tmpl.websiteChat, agentRole: tmpl.agentRole, orchestrationType: tmpl.orchestrationType, loopMaxIterations: tmpl.loopMaxIterations]

service-call.name: create#moqui.adk.AdkAgentTeamMember
service-call.in-map: [ownerPartyId: ownerPartyId, coordinatorConfigId: newCoord, memberConfigId: newMember, sequenceNum: tm.sequenceNum, delegationMode: tm.delegationMode ?: 'tool', enabled: 'Y']

set.from: [ ['Return policy': 'Customers may return any item within 30 days of delivery for a full refund, provided it is unused and in its original packaging. Refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5 business days of us receiving the return. Sale items are final and cannot be returned.'], ['Shipping policy': 'Standard shipping takes 3-5 business days. Express shipping (1-2 business days) is available at checkout for an extra fee. Orders placed before 2pm ship the same day. We currently ship only within the country; international shipping is not yet offered.'], ['Support hours': 'Customer support is available Monday to Friday, 9am to 6pm. We are closed on weekends and public holidays. Urgent order issues can be flagged in the chat and are picked up the next business day.'] ]
